title: Laura Vuittonet
compiled_truth: Laura Vuittonet is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-12-20 to 2002-05-02), Laura Vuittonet sent 133 and received 143 emails, totalling 276 interactions. Top correspondents: [A  Martin](people/a-martin) (52), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (30), [Jim Schwieger](people/jim-schwieger) (28), [David Baumbach](people/david-baumbach) (27), [Michael Olsen](people/michael-olsen) (23).
